raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2316 is a first-in-the-nation bill prohibiting California public schools from serving foods containing additives linked to cancer, DNA damage, and developmental and neurobehavioral issues in children.",
    "AB 2316 would prohibit schools from serving foods containing six synthetic food dyes and titanium dioxide.",
    "Consumption of synthetic food dyes can result in hyperactivity and other neurobehavioral problems in some children.",
    "Current FDA approvals of synthetic food dyes are based on outdated, decades-old research.",
    "The percentage of American children diagnosed with Attention Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) has increased dramatically in recent years.",
    "AB 2316 could help prompt a nationwide transition to safer alternative ingredients."
  ]
}
```
